models.name: Gemma 3n E2B IT (INT4) — Recommended
models.notes: Current mobile SOTA. Effective 2B parameters, optimised for edge devices. Best speed/quality trade-off on-device.

models.name: Gemma 3n E4B IT (INT4)
models.notes: Effective 4B parameters. Higher quality than E2B, requires more RAM. Good for high-end devices.

models.name: Gemma 3 1B IT (INT4) — Lightweight
models.notes: Very fast, minimal memory. Good fallback for older or low-RAM devices.
